ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the NBA team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team is part of */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's seasonal statistics record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds collected by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals made by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers committed by the team */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Team's free throw percentage */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made by the team */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls committed by the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the season */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Total number of games won in the season */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Total number of games lost in the season */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team in the season */,
  "playoff_appearance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team made the playoffs */,
  "playoff_rounds_won" INTEGER /* Number of playoff rounds won */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is associated with */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season the game was played */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went to overtime */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game statistics record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds collected by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player in the game */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player in the game */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Personal fouls committed by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player in the game */,
  "two_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Two-pointers made by the player in the game */,
  "two_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Two-pointers attempted by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus statistic for the player in the game */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, general manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is an admin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
